title: Taxonomy intelligence — category & subcat suggestion
description: When a supplier writes a product description, AI reads it and: (1) suggests the category if not set, (2) suggests matching subcats from that category's controlled list, (3) flags if description doesn't match assigned category. Prompt pattern: given description + available categories + scoped subcat list → return suggested_category, confidence, suggested_subcats, flag. Works for both supplier catalogue uploads and producer brief parsing.

title: Verify Resend domain for theballpark.ai
description: Currently sending guestlist notifications from onboarding@resend.dev (no DNS required). Add SPF/DKIM/DMARC records to theballpark.ai DNS, verify domain in Resend, then set EMAIL_FROM env var to 'Ballpark <noreply@theballpark.ai>'. Improves deliverability — current sender often lands in spam.

title: Public landing nav button for /welcome
description: When agency/supplier landing pages are built, add a 'Welcome' header button (left of any Sign in) on those pages. Currently /welcome is reachable only via the Welcome button in the authenticated app top-nav (testing aid).

title: Server-side admin enforcement audit
description: Most existing /api/* routes have no auth check at all — the server connects with service-role pg credentials and any client can call any endpoint. The new /api/admin/* routes added an x-bp-user-id header check (matches existing client-side admin gate) but this is stop-gap. When Supabase auth lands, switch to JWT validation everywhere.
